title: Nagai Stadium
description: Building in Higashisumiyoshi-ku, Osaka Prefecture, Japan
extract: Nagai Stadium , a.k.a. the Yanmar Stadium Nagai  for sponsorship reasons, is a stadium in Osaka, Japan. It is the home ground of J. League club Cerezo Osaka. The stadium has a seating capacity of 47,853. The rugby union club NTT DoCoMo Red Hurricanes Osaka use the venue for most of their home games.
